title: Add MiniBatchSparsePCA + dict_learning / dict_learning_online / fastica / non_negative_factorization / randomized_svd / sparse_encode module-level functions
description:
sklearn.decomposition exposes 6 module-level helper functions and one MiniBatch variant we don't yet have:
- MiniBatchSparsePCA (estimator, no orphan)
- dict_learning, dict_learning_online (functional API)
- fastica (functional)
- non_negative_factorization (functional)
- randomized_svd (utility — also useful internally)
- sparse_encode (functional)

Defer — the estimator equivalents already cover the same algorithms; the functional API is a convenience layer.
